mapper.insert: insert into reading_question ( passage_id, question_type, answer_mode, question_text, correct_answer, options_json, accepted_answers_json, group_label, display_order, score, is_deleted ) values ( #{passageId}, #{questionType}, #{answerMode}, #{questionText}, #{correctAnswer}, #{optionsJson}, #{acceptedAnswersJson}, #{groupLabel}, #{displayOrder}, #{score}, 0 )
mapper.select: select * from reading_question where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
select * from reading_question where passage_id = #{passageId} and is_deleted = 0 order by display_order asc, id asc
select * from reading_question where passage_id = #{passageId} order by display_order asc, id asc
mapper.update: update reading_question set question_type = #{questionType}, answer_mode = #{answerMode}, question_text = #{questionText}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, options_json = #{optionsJson}, accepted_answers_json = #{acceptedAnswersJson}, group_label = #{groupLabel}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, score = #{score} where id = #{id}
update reading_question set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update reading_question set is_deleted = 1 where passage_id = #{passageId} and is_deleted = 0
update reading_question set is_deleted = 0 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 1
update reading_question set is_deleted = 0 where passage_id = #{passageId} and is_deleted = 1
